title: Executive Order 5021—Making Edward V. Sheely Eligible for Nomination Without Examination
text:
The Executive Order of June 22, 1928, amending previous executive orders requiring candidates for presidential postmasterships to pass a civil service examination, is hereby waived so as to permit the nomination of Dr. Edward V. Sheely as postmaster at Memphis, Tennessee, without examination.
CALVIN COOLIDGE
The White House,
January 5, 1929.
